response.justification: Over 15 years of progressive full-stack experience with direct alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes — and active AI-agent infrastructure work in the current role covering MCP and agentic workflows. The polyglot background (Java, DLang, Swift, C++) and demonstrated TDD culture further support architectural breadth. The main gap is the absence of any explicit Nest.js or Vitest exposure, and Python does not appear in the skills list despite being a stated requirement.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple production-grade roles, directly matching the primary stack
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work satisfies the increasingly rare 'AI agent development' requirement
Proven TDD and testing culture evidenced by open-source testing libraries, workshops, and explicit methodology references across roles
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume entirely — a notable gap given it is listed as a primary framework
Python is not present in the skills list or any role description despite being a required proficiency
Kotlin is not mentioned; Java appears in older roles but the secondary Kotlin/Java requirement is only partially addressed
